prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-4PT11-POTTERYSET-11PC-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Double Sided Sculpting Pottery Tools Set with Storage Pouch, 11pc Description: Whether you're a professional potter or just dabbling in sculpting or carving as a new hobby, the ToolTreaux 11-piece pottery sculpting toolset is a great addition to either a growing and established or beginner's pottery tools collection. This carving set comes with 11 double-sided pieces, giving you a total of 21 different utensils to work with. Additionally, this set is incredibly versatile and not limited to just pottery - they are designed for precision and detailed work and are suitable to use with soft mediums like wax, clay, plaster, putty, mud, and more.

If you find yourself working in your crafting studio for prolonged periods of time, you need a sculpting toolset that is comfortable, easy on the hands, and can stand up to studio wear and tear. Made from durable, high-quality wood, the tools have a smooth finish and are easy to maneuver. Each tool measures approximately 10 - 11" in length, making them easy to handle but still substantial enough to provide engaged control when working on your artwork.

Each set comes with the following assorted styles of sculpting tools - curved flat angles, curved needlepoint, curved medium spearhead, curved large spearhead, curved loop, angled needlepoint, small spearhead fork, salt and pepper drill, a brush tool, and metal wire brush. In addition to these art tools, the set also comes with a convenient, plastic container with a sturdy zip closure to keep all your sculpting tools organized and in one place. The zipper closure makes the sculpting toolset great to travel with and easy to keep track of.

Let the sculpting begin. Search Terms: Art supplies sculpting putty diy wooden ceramic professional artist artisan craft crafting wood steel handle hook brush clay molding modeling carving cutting trimming smoothing durable sharp fine tip stainless pottery beginner tools Features: - VERSATILE SOFT MEDIUM SCULPTING TOOLS: This carving tool set comes with 11 double-sided pieces, giving you a total of 21 different utensils to work with. These tools are incredibly versatile and not limited to just pottery - they are designed for precision and detailed work and are suitable to use with soft mediums clay, was, plaster, putty, and more. - COMFORTABLE AND EASY TO USE: Made from high-quality and durable wood, the tools have a smooth finish and are easy to maneuver. Each tool measures approximately 10 - 11" in length, making them easy to handle but are substantial enough to provide engaged control when working on your craft projects. - INCLUDED STORAGE CASE: This set includes a convenient plastic carry case to keep all of your sculpting tools organized and in one place. The sturdy zipper closure makes the sculpting or carving tool set great to travel with and easy to keep track of when not in use. - VERSATILE CARVING TOOLS: The sculpting toolset includes: curved flat angles, curved needlepoint, curved medium spearhead, curved large spearhead, curved loop, angled needlepoint, small spearhead fork, salt, and pepper drill, brush tool, metal wire brush, and resealable carry case - SPECIFICATIONS: Product Dimensions: 5 x 10.1 x 4.8 inches; Case Dimensions: 7.72 x 3.66 x 1.14 inches; Materials: Wood, Steel; Storage case included; Double sided (21 assorted tools) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
